verified.name: Dog Facts (kinduff)
verified.description: Returns an array of random dog facts. Keyless JSON — a lightweight companion to Dog CEO for fact widgets.

verified.name: CoinRanking
verified.description: CoinRanking v2 API lists coins with market cap and price data. Some routes work without a key at low volume.

verified.name: QuickChart
verified.description: QuickChart. Generate Chart.js image charts for email, dashboards, etc. Provides a replacement API for the old Google Image Charts service.

info.title: QuickChart API
info.description: Generate Chart.js chart images, QR codes, barcodes, and machine-readable validation results.

get.summary: Generate a chart image from query parameters.

parameters.name: chart
parameters.description: Chart.js configuration object as JSON or Javascript.

post.summary: Generate a chart image from a JSON request body.
Validate a chart request and return JSON instead of an image.
post.description: Runs the chart configuration through the renderer and discards the image bytes. Use this before retrying or saving generated chart configs.

get.summary: Generate a QR code from query parameters.

post.summary: Generate a QR code from a JSON request body.
Validate a QR code request and return JSON instead of an image.
Generate many QR codes and return a ZIP archive.

200.description: ZIP archive containing one generated QR image per request item.

post.summary: Generate a barcode from a JSON request body.

type.description: Barcode type, such as code128 or ean13.

post.summary: Generate an agent-friendly chart config from natural language.
post.description: Returns the generated Chart.js config, a saved chart URL, and an editor URL instead of only returning image bytes.

chart.description: Chart.js configuration object, or a Javascript object string.

text.description: Text, URL, or payload to encode in the QR code.

verified.name: JokeAPI
verified.description: Single or two-part jokes with content flags in the response. ~120 req/min per IP.

sampleJson.setup: How can you tell an extroverted programmer?
sampleJson.delivery: He looks at YOUR shoes when he's talking.

dataset.title: Asset Inventory
dataset.description: This dataset is the beginning of the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) Enterprise Data Inventory (EDI) and Public Data Listing (PDL) and includes all the USPTO data assets.

dataset.title: The Artificial Intelligence Patent Dataset (AIPD) for Academia and Researchers
dataset.description: Contains Artificial Intelligence Patent Landscape data classifying 13,244,037 granted patents and PGPubs published from 1976 through 2023 in eight AI component technologies using state-of-the art machine learning based models.

verified.name: Studio Ghibli
verified.tagline: Ghibli films, characters and locations as JSON
verified.description: Community JSON API over the Studio Ghibli catalog. List films, fetch by ID, browse people and locations — no key, small responses, good for demos.

sampleJson.title: Castle in the Sky
sampleJson.description: The orphan Sheeta inherited a mysterious crystal that links her to the mythical sky-kingdom of Laputa. With the help of resourceful Pazu and a rollicking band of sky pirates, she makes her way to the ruins of the once-great civilization. Sheeta and Pazu must outwit the evil Muska, who plans to use Laputa's science to make himself ruler of the world.

sampleJson.title: Grave of the Fireflies
sampleJson.description: In the latter part of World War II, a boy and his sister, orphaned when their mother is killed in the firebombing of Tokyo, are left to survive on their own in what remains of civilian life in Japan. The plot follows this boy and his sister as they do their best to survive in the Japanese countryside, battling hunger, prejudice, and pride in their own quiet, personal battle.

verified.name: Httpbingo
verified.description: Community httpbin mirror on Cloudflare with QUIC support. /json and /get return request metadata as JSON for client debugging.

verified.name: QR & Barcode
verified.description: QR & Barcode. QR codes and barcodes (Code 128, EAN-13, Data Matrix, PDF417 + more). SVG or PNG output

info.title: SolSigs — Solana Data APIs for AI Agents
info.description: 22 Solana data endpoints paid via x402 micropayments in USDC. No API keys, no subscriptions — agents pay per call.

x402.description: x402 micropayment protocol. First request returns HTTP 402 with payment details. Send USDC payment on Solana, then retry with the same request. Most calls cost < $0.01 USDC.

post.summary: Register a webhook alert
post.description: Create price, volume, whale, or launch alerts that POST to your webhook when triggered.

post.summary: Fetch alpha signals from new launches and insider wallets
Search Solana DEXs for arbitrage opportunities
post.description: Scans DEXes for profitable cross-exchange arbitrage trades.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Token symbol or mint address (e.g. 'SOL' or a base58 mint)

parameters.name: minProfitBps
parameters.description: Minimum profit in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%)

token.description: Token symbol to scan (e.g. SOL, BONK)

post.summary: Fetch GitHub dev activity for a Solana protocol
post.description: Track commits, contributors, and audit status to gauge protocol development health.

post.summary: Fetch real-time DEX prices for a Solana token
post.description: Returns price, liquidity, and 24h volume from Jupiter and Birdeye aggregators.

402.description: Payment required — send USDC and retry

post.summary: Detect new token launches
post.description: Spot fresh token deployments on pump.fun and Raydium.

post.summary: Fetch NFT collection intel and wash trading signals
post.description: Floor prices, rarity rankings, and wash trading score for any Solana NFT collection.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort by floor, volume, or rarity

post.summary: Fetch Solana perps markets, funding rates, open interest

How do you tell HTML from HTML5?
- Try it out in Internet Explorer
- Did it work?
- No?
- It's HTML5.
